title: [MTR4] Kia Granbird
description: This resource pack adds the Kia Granbird coach bus to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.
body:
This resource pack adds the [3rd-generation Kia Granbird coach bus](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kia_Granbird#Third_generation_(2020%E2%80%93present)) to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod. There are three bus liveries included in the pack, but you can easily modify the texture to add more.

Requires [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) (MTR) version 4.0.3 or later.

## Included vehicles:
- Kia Granbird
> - 3rd generation
> > - Blank
> > - School bus
> > - IRB (fictional)
> - 2nd generation
> > - Blank
> > - School bus

## Future plans:
### v2.2
- Increase texture resolution to 64x
- Airport Limousine livery of 2nd-gen Kia Granbird
### v2.3
- Utilize JCM scripting to add turn signals, brake lights, and interior clocks
### v3.0
- Hyundai Universe 1st-gen (blank and school bus liveries)
- Hyundai Universe 2nd-gen (blank, school bus, and R-Bus liveries)
### v4.0
- Kia Granbird 1st-gen (blank livery only)
- Hyundai Unicity (blank and school bus liveries)
- Zyle-Daewoo FX212 (blank livery only)
